case_title: JEFF SCHLARB DESIGN STUDIO VS. WILLIAM FREIBERG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,772.93 FILED BY JEFF SCHLARB DESIGN STUDIO AS TO DEFENDANT FREIBERG, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JEFF SCHLARB DESIGN STUDIO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AMITA PATEL, CHIEF OPPERATIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT WILLIAM FREIBERG IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS KEMI KIRKBY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40.00) SERVED JUN-21-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FREIBERG, WILLIAM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFF SCHLARB DESIGN STUDIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFF SCHLARB DESIGN STUDIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FREIBERG, WILLIAM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
